svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(233, 233, 233), rgb(82, 82, 82)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(82, 82, 82), rgb(233, 233, 233));
